priorityQueue.problem: Teams need a common rubric for reviewing agent outputs before internal workflows spread across departments.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Score agent drafts, identify missing guardrails, suggest prompt improvements, and prepare coaching notes for builders.

priorityQueue.problem: Sales teams need reliable discovery summaries that identify use case, data need, urgency, decision process, and next action.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Turn call notes into structured opportunity intelligence and product feedback without losing customer nuance.

priorityQueue.problem: Customer-facing teams need role-specific training packs when new identity intelligence workflows launch.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Convert release notes, FAQs, and workflow examples into workshop agendas, scripts, and practice exercises.

priorityQueue.problem: Platform teams need to convert broad data onboarding requests into precise identity match requirements before engineering starts.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Read discovery notes and produce a source-to-match specification with identifiers, confidence thresholds, exception handling, and approval gates.

priorityQueue.problem: Sales and marketing teams need to validate audience filters, expected volume, pricing, and suppression rules before a lead list is activated.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Inspect the requested audience, flag impossible or risky criteria, and produce a buyer-ready fulfillment brief.

priorityQueue.problem: Data operations teams need digestible drift summaries when source freshness, match rates, and exception volumes move together.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Review quality metrics, explain likely drivers, draft follow-up checks, and prepare the weekly stakeholder note.

priorityQueue.problem: Implementation teams need faster handoffs for API, batch, Snowflake, and cloud-storage data delivery decisions.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Synthesize client requirements into delivery mode, schema mapping, refresh cadence, test plan, and launch blockers.

priorityQueue.problem: Risk teams need explainable reason-code summaries when phone, email, address, and identity signals point to elevated risk.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Summarize risk drivers, confidence, and human review needs from structured signal outputs and policy notes.

priorityQueue.problem: Research teams need structured briefs that separate verified identity context from leads that still require review.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Turn research notes and public-record extracts into a concise brief with citations, confidence labels, and unresolved questions.

priorityQueue.problem: Teams need a repeatable review of data-use exceptions before a customer-facing workflow is approved.
priorityQueue.agent_goal: Classify the request, identify policy conflicts, draft reviewer questions, and route to the right approver.

workflowSpec.detail: Teams need a common rubric for reviewing agent outputs before internal workflows spread across departments.
workflowSpec.acceptance_criteria: A non-technical stakeholder can confirm the workflow, required inputs, output format, and approval gate.

workflowSpec.detail: Score agent drafts, identify missing guardrails, suggest prompt improvements, and prepare coaching notes for builders.
workflowSpec.acceptance_criteria: Agent output includes confidence, source references, unresolved questions, and next action.

workflowSpec.detail: Agent specs, test outputs, review rubric
workflowSpec.acceptance_criteria: Every input has a named source owner, refresh expectation, and sensitive-field handling rule.

workflowSpec.detail: Human reviewer approves external-facing language, policy-sensitive decisions, and any low-confidence recommendation.
workflowSpec.acceptance_criteria: No consequential decision leaves the workflow without a reviewer trace.

workflowSpec.detail: Build a repeatable Cowork folder template, review checklist, sample input pack, and audit log export.
workflowSpec.acceptance_criteria: Delivery team can size setup, test coverage, permissions, and rollout tasks in one planning session.

agentEval.test_prompt: Review the Internal AI Agent Review Coach output for spec completeness.
agentEval.expected_behavior: Use only supplied source files, state confidence, and route unresolved decisions to a human owner.
agentEval.review_note: Needs prompt guardrail and reviewer checklist update
